zh.Gawsworth, McClesfield, Cheshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
zh.Gawsworth, Ches, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fitton於1402年出生在英國爾加福斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir Lawrence Fitton27歲，母親Lady Agnes Hesketh28歲。他於1427年與Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring在英國爾加福斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年7月16日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fitton于1402年出生在英国爾加福斯沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Lawrence Fitton27岁，母亲Lady Agnes Hesketh28岁。他于1427年与Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring在英国爾加福斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年7月16日在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fitton was born in 1402, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Lawrence Fitton, was 27 and his mother, Lady Agnes Hesketh, was 28. He married Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring in 1427, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 16 July 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fitton est né en 1402, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lawrence Fitton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Hesketh, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring en 1427, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fitton 1402 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Lawrence Fitton 27 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Hesketh 28. Er hat 1427 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Juli 1449 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitton è nato il nel 1402 nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Lawrence Fitton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Hesketh, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring nel 1427, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 luglio 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fittonが1402年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Lawrence Fittonは27歳，母Lady Agnes Heskethは28歳であった。1427年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスでHelena "Ellen" Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年7月16日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitton(이)가 1402년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Fitton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Hesketh(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 7월 16일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitton nasceu em 1402, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lawrence Fitton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Hesketh, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring em 1427, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fitton родился в 1402 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Fitton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Hesketh, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring в 1427 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 16 июля 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring en 1427, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
